question: Which projects or institutions are tokenizing real-world assets on Stellar?

golden.answer:
A grounded answer derives its named examples and status claims from the live Stellar Scout directory or research data, then dates the roster so it is not presented as permanent. As of 2026-07-11, a live RWA-tokenization project search returned 15 matches, including WisdomTree, Spydra, and Metafyed.

The dated example is illustrative: a later grounded answer should report what the same source basis supports at its own observation time while preserving the stable distinctions above.
keyFacts: Presents specific source-supported content as a current or dated observation rather than as an unsupported memory claim.
Makes the as-of date visible for every changeable roster, status, version, or measurement.
Separates primary-confirmed live Stellar products from announced or planned products.
avoid: Do NOT treat directory presence or entity Live status as proof of a live Stellar-issued product.
Do NOT put planned DTCC Stellar work in the live bucket.
Do NOT claim all RWA products use SEP-8 or one identical legal/control model.
Do NOT freeze volatile AUM or roster counts without dated primary evidence.
Do NOT present the observed live result set as a complete or permanent roster; explicitly historical facts remain historical.
golden.notes:
2026-06-29 re-verified dated claims and freshness-gated. Franklin Templeton (BENJI/FOBXX, ~$654M AUM on Stellar) and WisdomTree (Prime funds + gold) confirmed; Figure YLDS = SEC-registered face-amount certificate, live on Stellar May 5, 2026 (stellar.org/press/figure-announces-launch-of-ylds-on-stellar-network) — consistent with q-rwa-dtcc-tokenization which keeps DTCC's DTC service PLANNED for H1 2027 (not live). Ondo Finance also active. Landscape evolving/freshness-sensitive (quarterly). Trap: inventing projects or presenting DTCC's forward-dated plan as live.
Also good if the answer: Mentions other RWA/tokenization participants (e.g. DTCC's planned DTC tokenization service) and treats the landscape as evolving. | Notes these use Stellar's regulated-asset model (SEP-8 + flags).
Golden cites: Scout/Lumenloop project directory entries and/or dated issuer sources.
CORRECTION 2026-07-10: grade dated product-level deployment and legal/mechanism scope. DTCC is planned H1 2027 on Stellar. GOLD is the live WisdomTree code. No roster-wide SEP-8 gate.

corroboration.claim: Primary-confirmed live Stellar RWA products include BENJI/FOBXX, WisdomTree funds/GOLD, USDY, YLDS, Etherfuse Stablebonds, and Spiko/Amundi SAFO
